title: Supervisory Development Program
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable leadership workshop for building practical supervisory development program habits at work.
whyThisMatters: Supervisory Development Program helps supervisors, managers, and team leads turn supervisory development program into clearer expectations, better conversations, and practical follow-through. Participants work through Who needs to acquire key skills for improved performance and productivity, To develop systematic process for problem solving and decision-making, and Introduction To Supervision And Management so they can lead people and workplace change with more confidence.
builtFor: High-potential employees preparing for wider responsibility
Teams that need stronger people-management habits
walkAwayWith: Clarify expectations and leadership responsibilities in practical workplace terms.
Use structured conversations to guide performance and accountability.
Strengthen confidence when influencing, coaching, or supporting others.
Build action steps that can be applied immediately after the workshop.

modules.title: Who needs to acquire key skills for improved performance and productivity
To develop systematic process for problem solving and decision-making
Management and the role of a supervisor?

methodologyCaption: Short facilitator inputs are balanced with discussion, reflection, and practical activities so participants can connect the ideas to real workplace situations.
